title: Advanced HeroQuest - Lets Play - Part One
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tyRJESdSDm4

The dungeon doors swing open. Daniel's heroes descend into the first rooms of their Advanced HeroQuest campaign, hunting a stolen magical lantern through procedurally generated corridors. The Skaven are waiting — but so is the game's signature uncertainty, where every room reveal could bring treasure, traps, or a thoroughly unwelcome surprise.

This first proper gameplay session showcases the exploration and combat systems in action: random room generation, threat management, and the particular tension of not knowing what's behind the next door. It's classic dungeon crawling at its most unpredictable.

----

What's the most memorable room reveal you've had in a dungeon crawler?
